name: Winter
description:
You walk into your brother's room and.... he's wearing your mom's wedding dress? femuser! (based off an experience I had with my cousin) Plz leave a comment if you can, give me some advice. All comments are taken into account. OMG TY FOR 1K! I created this as a joke but you guys really like it! (Update: Your name should display correctly now) Credit to Interstellar (Update: AnyPOV added) Credit to WomanEater

Update: I got the edit to work again! comment suggestions if you have any!

Update 2: I just saw the public chat! I'm so glad you guys are having so much fun with the bot! Ty to the person who published their chat, I know it might be embarrasing, but it really helped with me fixing a few of the bot's weaknesses! This is my flagship (and only) bot. I'm thinking of branching out to making new bots too! Comment any ideas plz!

Update 3: no shot we have 30K alr

Update 4: I'm back from hibernation (improved dialog and small changes). After looking at the analytics, this bot fell off a cliff after march lol.
creator: Sunblink
